message:
Refactor harness tests to use explicit handle collection instead of chain()

Replace .chain() pattern for spawning mixed thread types with explicit
handles.push() / handles.extend(). The chain approach required matching
iterator types across different thread spawners. Using explicit
Vec<JoinHandle> with push/extend is clearer and avoids type-inference
issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
